name: Minion: Team Up
description: Another Minion that hasn't taken a turn this round immediately takes a turn. That character can't use Team Up this turn.

name: Minion: Fodder
description: Abilities can't increase a Minion's Max HP. Abilities granted by Templates deal half damage and no bonus damage.

name: Minion: Swift Attack
description: Replaces **Melee Attack**

name: Minion: Opportunity
description:
**Condition**: A hostile character within the Range of **Melee Attack** performs a *Movement* **Action**.
**Effect**: Perform **Melee Attack** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action**.

name: Minion: Assist
description: An adjacent non-Minion allied character gains **+1 Advantage** on their next **Attack Roll**.

name: Minion: Long Reach
description:
Requires **Melee Attack.**
**Melee Attack** gains **+1 Range.**

name: Minion: Evasion
description: If the Minion Resists an effect that would deal half damage: the Minion takes no damage.

name: Minion: Revenge
description: When this minion is defeated: adjacent characters take [tier]+2 damage.

name: Minion: Swarm
description:
- At the end of a turn granted by **Team Up**: Another Minion that hasn't taken a turn this round immediately takes a turn. That character can't use **Team Up** this turn.
- When a hostile character defeats this minion during their turn: that character gains (?). A character can only gain AP this way 1/Round.

name: Minion: Take Cover
description:
Perform **Take Cover** only as the last **Action** in a turn.
Attacks against the **Minion** have **+1 Disadvantage** until the start of its next turn.

name: Assassin: Backstab
description: If the target has no adjacent allies, **Backstab** has **+1 Advantage** and **On Hit:** **Bleeding 1+[tier]**.

name: Assassin: Dodge
description:
**Condition**: The Assassin takes damage.
**Effect**: The Assassin performs **Evade** and moves an extra tile when **Evading** this way.

name: Assassin: Skirmisher
description: The Assassin can move diagonally.

name: Assassin: Sap
description:
Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Stunned +1**.
If the target has no adjacent allies: reduce the cost of **Sap** to **1 AP**.

name: Assassin: Ensnare
description: Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Immobilized** until the end of their next turn.

name: Assassin: Needle Shot
description:
- **Flurry**
- Deals **Piercing Damage**.
- **On Hit:** **Bleeding** +1.

name: Assassin: Vanish
description: The Assassin gains **Concealment 6** until the end of its next turn.

name: Assassin: Jump
description: This turn, while moving, the Assassin is **Flying**.

name: Assassin: Trip
description:
**Condition:** An adjacent hostile character with no adjacent allies performs a *Movement* **Action**.

**Effect**: That character makes a **Resistance** Roll or loses that *Movement* **Action** and becomes **Prone**.

name: Assassin: Death Attack
description: **Backstab's** 1/Round limit is ignored against characters with no adjacent allies.

name: Assassin: Death Attack of Opportunity
description:
- Perform **Death Attack of Opportunity** only while the Assassin is adjacent to exactly one hostile character.
- **Condition**: An adjacent hostile character performs a *Movement* **Action**.
- **Effect:** Perform **Backstab** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action**. It gains **On Damage: Bleeding +1**.

name: Medic: Restore
description: Target allied character clears a hostile Condition.

name: Medic: Heal
description: Target allied character receives Healing equal to their Max HP (half for Elite/Legendary).

name: Medic: Emergency Aid
description:
**Condition:** An allied character receives a hostile Condition.
**Effect:** The Medic moves toward that character.

name: Medic: Weakness Exposure
description: Deals **Piercing Damage**. **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Vulnerable** until they perform **Refocus**.

name: Medic: Shove
description: 1/Round. Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Prone**.

name: Medic: Resupply
description: 1/Round. A target allied character performs **Refocus** if able.

name: Medic: Distant Curatives
description: The Medic's *Support* **Actions** have **Range 4**.

name: Medic: Modern Medicine
description: The Medic's *Spell* **Actions** aren't **Spells** and don't provoke **Reactions**.

name: Medic: Lasting Cure
description: **Heal** costs **2 AP** but instead provides **Regeneration X** where X is half the target's missing HP.

name: Medic: Prophylaxis
description: Target allied character gains **Barrier [tier]+2**. This Barrier doesn't end as turns end.

name: Beast: Melee Attack
description:
**+1 Disadvantage**. **On Hit:** The Beast can perform **Clamp** as a Free Action.

Against an **Immobilized** character: The attack has **+1 Advantage** and **+3 Bonus Damage**.

name: Beast: Clamp
description: Target hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll** or is **Immobilized** until they are no longer adjacent to the Beast.

name: Beast: Thrash
description: 1/Round. Perform **Thrash** only while a hostile character is **Immobilized** by **Clamp**. The Beast and the Immobilized character simultaneously move 1 tile in any direction. This movement doesn't provoke **Reactions**.

name: Beast: Rampage
description: 1/Encounter. The Beast moves twice its SPD. During this movement: it can't change directions, passes through hostile characters, has **Damage Resistance**, ignores **Difficult Terrain**, and hostile characters it becomes adjacent to make a **Resistance Roll**, becoming **Prone** on a failure. At the end of this movement: the Beast can perform **Clamp** as a Free Action.

name: Beast: Ragdoll
description: Perform **Ragdoll** only if a hostile character was **Immobilized** by **Clamp** at the beginning of the Beast's turn. The **Immobilized** character suffers **Push 4**, **Stunned 1** and **Chaos Damage** equal to half their current HP. If it collides with another character both characters become **Prone**.

name: Beast: Unleash
description: For the rest of the encounter: The Beast has 0 Armor and can't receive **Healing** or be targeted by *Support* **Actions**. It gains **+1 SPD** and gains **1 AP** at the beginning of each of its turns.

name: Beast: Imposing
description: Characters **Immobilized** by the Beast's **Clamp** have **+1 Disadvantage** on **Attack Rolls** and **Resistance Rolls**.

name: Beast: Shatter
description: When the Beast's **Melee Attack** hits a character **Immobilized** by **Clamp**: That character is **Sundered** for the rest of the encounter.

name: Guardian: Heavy Attack
description: **On Hit:** Push 1. Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or falls **Prone**.

name: Guardian: Counterattack
description:
**Condition:** The Guardian takes damage from a hostile character within **Range 2**.
**Effect:** Deal [tier]+1 damage to the attacker within Range 2. This is a **Free Reaction** and can be used any number of times.

name: Guardian: Entrenched
description: Hostile characters treat adjacent spaces as **Difficult Terrain**.

name: Guardian: Unbreakable
description: The Guardian and adjacent allies have **Damage Resistance**. This doesn't apply while the Guardian is **Prone**, **Stunned**, or **Immobilized**.

name: Guardian: Destructive Wave
description: All characters within Range 2 make a **Resistance Roll**, becoming **Prone** and **Stunned +1** on a failure. Adjacent allied characters have **+1 Advantage** on the **Resistance Roll**.

name: Guardian: Bouncing Shield
description: When you perform **Bouncing Shield** and hit, you may repeat the attack with **Flurry** against a different character within Range 2 of the previous target. This effect can occur no more than [tier]+1 times.

name: Guardian: Hand of Protection
description: Target allied character becomes **Invulnerable** until the start of the Guardian's next turn, or until the Guardian is defeated or moves beyond Range 3. While this is active: The Guardian loses **Unbreakable**.

name: Guardian: Attack of Opportunity
description:
1/Round. **Condition:** A hostile character within the Range of **Heavy Attack** performs a *Movement* **Action**.
**Effect:** Perform **Heavy Attack** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action**.

name: Guardian: Mail Breaker
description: **Counterattack** deals **Piercing Damage**.

name: Guardian: Tears of Denial
description: The first time the Guardian is hit by an **Attack** each round: prevent all damage and bonus damage from that **Attack**.

name: Sentinel: Melee Attack
description: **+1 Advantage** when not the Sentinel's turn.

name: Sentinel: Attack of Opportunity
description:
- **Condition:** A hostile character within Range 2 performs a *Movement* **Action**.
- **Effect:** Perform **Melee Attack** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action**.

name: Sentinel: Preparation
description: The next time the Sentinel would perform **Melee Attack** against a target, the Sentinel performs **Melee Attack** twice against that target instead.

name: Sentinel: Combat Reflexes
description:
The Sentinel is **Immobilized** until **Combat Reflexes** is deactivated. (**Deactivate:** â—†â—†). 

While active: **Attack of Opportunity** is **1/Turn** instead of **1/Round**.

name: Sentinel: Brace
description:
1/Round. **Condition:** The Sentinel is dealt any amount of damage and bonus damage from a single source.
**Effect:** The Sentinel gains **Damage Resistance** against the triggering damage. An adjacent non-Minion allied character gains **+1 Advantage** on their next **Attack Roll**.

name: Sentinel: Hamstring
description: **Attack of Opportunity** gains **On Hit:** The target is **Immobilized** until the start of their next turn.

name: Sentinel: Long Reach
description: **Melee Attack** gains **+1 Range**.

name: Sentinel: Mage Slayer
description: **Attack of Opportunity** has the following additional **Condition:** A hostile character within the Range of **Melee Attack** performs a *Spell* **Action**.

name: Sentinel: Avenger
description: **Attack of Opportunity** has the following additional **Condition:** A hostile character within the Range of **Melee Attack** performs an **Action** that targets an adjacent allied character.

name: Sentinel: Stable
description: The Sentinel ignores **Difficult Terrain**.

name: Executioner: Executioner's Swing
description:
Perform Executioner's Swing only with **Initiative**.

 **+1 Advantage**.

Deals bonus **Piercing Chaos Damage** equal to half the target's max HP.

name: Executioner: Sharpen
description: Reduces the **AP Cost** of the next **Executioner's Swing** by 1. **Executioner's Swing** can't be performed next turn.

name: Executioner: Gallows Hook
description: **Flurry.** **On Hit:** Pull the target adjacent to the Executioner.

name: Executioner: Beyond Salvation
description: Adjacent hostile characters can't move or be moved except by their own **Actions**.

name: Executioner: Throat Punch
description: **Flurry.** 1/Round. **On Hit:** The target is **Silenced** until the end of their next turn. (A **Silenced** character can't perform *Spell* **Actions**.)

name: Executioner: At Any Cost
description: The Executioner has **Damage Resistance** while adjacent to a hostile character.

name: Executioner: Public Execution
description: When the Executioner reduces a hostile character to 0 HP hostile characters in a **Size 3 Area** centered on the Executioner make a **Resistance Roll**. A character that fails is **Immobilized 1**.

name: Executioner: In the Name of God
description: **Executioner's Swing** deals double damage.

name: Scourge: Adaptation
description:
When this NPC is created, choose an adaptation.
- Wings: The Scourge is Flying.
- Plating: The Scourge has +2 Armor.
- Fast: The Scourge has +1 Speed.
- Reflective: The Scourge has +1 Advantage on Resistance Rolls.

name: Scourge: Emanation - Blast
description: Targets a **Size 1 Area** within **Range 2**.

name: Spider: Swift Attack
description: **+1 Advantage** against characters in **Difficult Terrain**. **On Hit:** **Poisoned +1**.

name: Spider: Attack of Opportunity
description:
1/Round. **Condition:** A hostile character within the Spider's attack range performs a *Movement* **Action**.
**Effect:** Perform **Swift Attack** on the triggering character before the triggering **Action**.

name: Spider: Set Snare
description: 1/Encounter. Creates **Difficult Terrain** in a **Size 1 Area** within Range 3.

name: Spider: Stable
description: Ignores **Difficult Terrain**.

name: Spider: Envenomed Snare
description: When the Spider's **Difficult Terrain** causes a hostile character to spend additional movement: That character is **Poisoned +1**. (No roll.)

name: Spider: Impassable Snare
description: **Difficult Terrain** created by the Spider's **Snare** requires one additional **Speed** of movement per tile entered.

name: Spider: Pounce
description:
1/Round. **Condition:** A hostile character performs a *Movement* **Action** while within a **Snare**, or enters a **Snare** during movement.
**Effect:** The Spider performs a *Movement* **Action**. It must end this movement closer to the triggering character than it began.

name: Spider: Mobile Snare
description: At the beginning of the Spider's turn: Choose any number of **Snares** in play. For each chosen **Snare** move it to a tile within Range 2 of that **Snare**. (It doesn't cross the intervening distance.)

name: Spider: Camouflage
description: While within a **Snare**: The Spider has **Concealment 3**.

name: Spider: Venom Spit
description: **+1 Advantage** against characters in **Difficult Terrain**. **On Hit:** **Poisoned +2**.

name: Spider: Manifold Snare
description: **Set Snare** is **Charged** instead of **1/Encounter**.

name: Mindflayer: Spell Attack
description: **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Addled**.

name: Mindflayer: Compulsion
description: Target takes [tier]+4 **Chaos Damage** at the end of their next turn unless they spend **Focus**.

name: Mindflayer: Blink
description: Teleport up to Range 6. This movement doesn't provoke **Reactions**.

name: Mindflayer: Extract Mind
description: 1/Round. **On Hit:** If the target has no **Focus** remaining deals bonus **Chaos Damage** equal to that character's maximum HP.

name: Mindflayer: Thoughtskein
description: Target hostile character with less than half their maximum **Focus** remaining becomes **Slowed +1**. (No roll.)

name: Mindflayer: Wandering
description: 1/Round. **On Hit:** Target performs *Move* in a direction of the Mindflayer's choice unless they spend [tier]+1 **Focus**.

name: Mindflayer: Mindleech Trap
description: A **Mindleech Trap** deploys in a free space and is triggered by the hostile character that moves into it. **Effect:** That character makes a **Resistance Roll** or loses [tier]+2 **Focus**. Whether or not they Resist they become **Immobilized** until the end of their next turn if they have less than half their maximum **Focus** remaining.

name: Mindflayer: Nether Spike
description: A hostile character that spends **Focus** while adjacent to the Mindflayer takes that much **Chaos Damage**.

name: Mindflayer: Detect Thoughts
description: The Mindflayer has **Damage Resistance** from characters with less than half their maximum **Focus** remaining.

name: Mindflayer: Curse of the Silent
description: **Compulsion** targets all hostile characters in a **Size 1 Area** within range.

name: Angel: Principality
description: The Angel becomes **Immobilized**. Allied characters in a **Size 2 Area** centered on the Angel have **+1 Advantage** on **Resistance Rolls**, and attacks against them have **+1 Disadvantage**.

name: Angel: Regenerator
description: At the start of the Angel's turn it clears a hostile Condition.

name: Angel: Goad
description: 1/Round. **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll**. On a failure that character performs *Move* toward the Angel.

name: Angel: Scorching Ray
description: **+1 Disadvantage** if the Angel has performed an **Attack** this turn.

name: Angel: Solar Flare
description: Target hostile character becomes **Blinded 3** until the end of their next turn. (No roll.)

name: Angel: Degeneration Aura
description: Hostile characters in **Principality** are **Sundered**.

name: Angel: Immaculate Aura
description: A friendly character that begins their turn in **Principality** or moves into **Principality** for the first time during their turn receives **2 Healing**.

name: Invoker: Flame Strike
description: Targets two **Size 1 Areas**. **On Attack:** The Invoker becomes **Immobilized 1**.

name: Invoker: Overload
description: The Invoker's next **Flame Strike** knocks targets **Prone** on damage.

name: Invoker: Blanketing Fire
description: **+1 Net Advantage** on **Flame Strike** when targeting the same areas as the previous **Flame Strike**.

name: Invoker: Artillery
description: Treats obstructions as **Cover** when determining attack lines.

name: Invoker: Mage Armor
description: **Damage Resistance** from *Melee* **Actions**.

name: Invoker: Exploding Trap
description: An **Exploding Trap** deploys in a free space and is triggered by the hostile character that moves into it. **Effect:** That character makes a **Resistance Roll** or suffers [tier]+4 **Damage** and **Push 2**. A character that Resists suffers half damage and isn't pushed.

name: Invoker: Blink
description: Teleport to a free tile within range. **Blink** doesn't provoke **Reactions**.

name: Invoker: Shrapnel Blasts
description: **Flame Strike** gains **On Miss:** The target suffers **Bleeding +1**. (No roll.)

name: Invoker: Secret Fire
description: **Flame Strike** becomes **Charged** and can only be performed with **Initiative**. **On Damage:** The target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Stunned +2**.

name: Invoker: Radiant Fire
description: The Invoker ignores **Concealment** and *Stealth* **Actions**. **Flame Strike** leaves a lingering **Size 1 Area** until the Invoker next performs **Flame Strike**. A character in this area loses **Concealment** and can't perform *Stealth* **Actions**.

name: Aberration: Backstab
description: 1/Round. **On Hit:** Target makes a **Resistance Roll** or becomes **Dazed +1**.

name: Aberration: Namestealing
description:
1/Round. **Condition:** A hostile character within **Range 4** makes an **Action Resolution** where the dice show exactly two "1"s.
**Effect:** Consult the other number shown on the dice. For the rest of the encounter or until the Aberration is defeated – that character treats that value on any die they roll (including an Action Resolution, Advantage, Disadvantage, or damage die) as a 0.

name: Aberration: Skirmisher
description: The Aberration can move diagonally.

name: Aberration: Propagation
description: When the Aberration deals damage or inflicts a **Condition** to a hostile non-Summoned character, the hostile character subsequently named in alphabetical order (looping, if necessary) also suffers that much damage or suffers that Condition. *(Apply the base damage before defenses. No roll.)*

name: Aberration: Destroy Summon
description:
Perform **Destroy Summon** only with **Initiative**. 

**On Hit:** The target **Summoned** character is reduced to 0 HP. (No roll.)

name: Aberration: Destroy Hope
description: Adjacent hostile character makes a **Resistance Roll**. On a failure for the rest of the encounter: that character can't pay the Inspiration costs of non-Ultimate abilities.

name: Aberration: Light Eater
description:
1/Round. **Condition:** A hostile character within Range 4 is reduced to 0 HP.
**Effect:** For the rest of the Quest, that character can't use a **Narrative Tag** of the Aberration's choice.

name: Aberration: Hide
description:
An Aberration can **Hide** only if it performed **Hunker Down** last turn. 1/Round. **Condition:** A hostile character begins their turn.
**Effect:** That character makes a **Resistance Roll**. On a failure this turn that character can't target the Aberration with **Actions** that target only one character.

name: Aberration: Infliction
description: **Backstab** also inflicts **Slowed +1** on a failed **Resistance Roll**.

name: Aberration: Fleshmend
description: The Aberration recovers half its maximum HP when performing **Refocus**.

name: Aberration: Skinshift
description: The Aberration ignores **Damage** and **Conditions** from **Actions** that share a name with the last **Action** to inflict **Damage** or a **Condition** on the Aberration.

name: Aberration: Aberrant Movement
description: The Aberration ignores **Difficult Terrain** and can move through hostile characters.

name: Aberration: Mobius Trip
description: When the Aberration becomes adjacent to a map edge: The Aberration may **Teleport** to the opposite map edge appearing in the nearest free tile. The Aberration ends the current **Movement** and loses all unspent **AP**.

name: Duelist: Melee Attack
description:
- **Flurry**
- After spending **AP** to perform **Melee Attack**: Repeat **Melee Attack** as a **Free Action** a number of times equal to the Duelist's level.

name: Duelist: Duel
description:
The **Duelist** marks a target. The **Duelist** treats the marked target as **Sundered** and has **Damage Resistance** from the marked target, and their attacks against the marked target have **+1 Advantage**. The mark lasts for the rest of the scene, until the marked target is reduced to 0 HP, or until this **Action** is performed again.

When the **Marked** target is reduced to 0 HP, recharge **Duel**.

name: Duelist: Parry
description:
**Condition:** A character hits the **Duelist** with the **Attack Roll** of a *Melee Weapon Attack*.

**Effect:** The **Duelist** makes an **Attack Roll** against that character. On a hit, the triggering attack roll misses instead.

name: Duelist: Lethality
description: The Duelist's attacks have **On Critical Hit:** The target chooses - they are **Dazed 3**, **Slowed 2**, or **Immobilized 1**. They can't choose a condition they have already.

name: Duelist: Falling Feathers
description:
- **Flurry**
- **On Hit:** The Duelist may **Move 2**. The movement doesn't trigger **Reactions**.

name: Duelist: Grace
description: Each round, the first **Reaction** the Duelist triggers has no effect.
